title: Perform shed duties
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform shed duties demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for shed work

pcs.text: Check the shed for safety and reduce any hazards using the hierarchy of controls in line with work health and safety (WHS) standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the shed for safety and reduce any hazards using the hierarchy of controls in line with work health and safety (WHS) standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the shed for safety and reduce any hazards using the hierarchy of controls in line with work health and safety (WHS) standards.

pcs.text: Check the shed for any non-wool contamination and report to the Wool Classer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the shed for any non-wool contamination and report to the Wool Classer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the shed for any non-wool contamination and report to the Wool Classer.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Comply with workplace animal welfare and biosecurity policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with workplace animal welfare and biosecurity policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with workplace animal welfare and biosecurity policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for shed work

elements.title: Perform board duties

pcs.text: Remove urine stain wool, black wool, and contamination on the shearing board
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove urine stain wool, black wool, and contamination on the shearing board?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove urine stain wool, black wool, and contamination on the shearing board.

pcs.text: Pick up belly wool and remove any urine stain and prepare as required by Wool Classer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pick up belly wool and remove any urine stain and prepare as required by Wool Classer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pick up belly wool and remove any urine stain and prepare as required by Wool Classer.

pcs.text: Check crutch area for urine stain and dag and remove crutch wool as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check crutch area for urine stain and dag and remove crutch wool as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check crutch area for urine stain and dag and remove crutch wool as directed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Pick up fleece and throw or park and retrieve later if wool table is not clear
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pick up fleece and throw or park and retrieve later if wool table is not clear?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pick up fleece and throw or park and retrieve later if wool table is not clear.

pcs.text: Monitor removal of wool and maintenance of the board and provide extra support when needed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor removal of wool and maintenance of the board and provide extra support when needed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor removal of wool and maintenance of the board and provide extra support when needed.

pcs.text: Carry lambs’ wool and prematurely shorn wools to the wool table using boards or paddles if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry lambs’ wool and prematurely shorn wools to the wool table using boards or paddles if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry lambs’ wool and prematurely shorn wools to the wool table using boards or paddles if required.

pcs.text: Provide support to lesser experienced wool handling staff as directed by the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide support to lesser experienced wool handling staff as directed by the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide support to lesser experienced wool handling staff as directed by the supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform board duties

elements.title: Prepare wool

pcs.text: Sweep up locks and separate non-matching wool where directed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sweep up locks and separate non-matching wool where directed.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove shanks and jowls as directed and place in correct bins.

elements.title: Skirt fleeces

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek information on skirting requirements for mob according to the Wool Classer’s specifications.

pcs.text: Remove fribs and sweats and place in appropriate bins in line with Wool Classer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove short crutch wool and wiggings and place with locks in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek Wool Classer’s advice about the need for the removal of wool carrying clumpy vegetable matter.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek Wool Classer’s feedback on accuracy of skirting.

pcs.text: Skirt fleeces efficiently and effectively to match workflow

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Skirt fleeces efficiently and effectively to match workflow.

pcs.text: Seek Wool Classer’s advice about the need for the removal of faults in fleece wool lacking in uniformity

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek Wool Classer’s advice about the need for the removal of faults in fleece wool lacking in uniformity.

elements.title: Prepare oddments

pcs.text: Sort crutchings for dags or urine stain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sort crutchings for dags or urine stain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sort crutchings for dags or urine stain.

pcs.text: Identify and separate any medullated fibre

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and remove skin pieces, brand, moit, pigmented/black wool.

elements.title: Maintain wool flow and minimise contamination risk

pcs.text: Clear the immediate shearing area after each sheep is shorn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear the immediate shearing area after each sheep is shorn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear the immediate shearing area after each sheep is shorn.

pcs.text: Sweep shearing board, wool room, and area beneath the wool table as regularly as necessary during the shearing operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sweep shearing board, wool room, and area beneath the wool table as regularly as necessary during the shearing operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sweep shearing board, wool room, and area beneath the wool table as regularly as necessary during the shearing operation.

pcs.text: Keep the shearing board and the wool room free of potential contamination

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep the shearing board and the wool room free of potential contamination.

pcs.text: Remove waste and place appropriately in full consideration of environmental implications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove waste and place appropriately in full consideration of environmental implications.

pcs.text: Minimise the risk of mixing wool between lines through regular sweeping and maintenance of bins, other containers and the wool area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise the risk of mixing wool between lines through regular sweeping and maintenance of bins, other containers and the wool area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise the risk of mixing wool between lines through regular sweeping and maintenance of bins, other containers and the wool area.

pcs.text: Complete all tasks and tend to contingencies in a professional, team-based manner

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete all tasks and tend to contingencies in a professional, team-based manner.
